blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,251 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 48 mph may cause lift holds.

Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 27.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
